# Sulphuric acid

**SULPHURIC ACID PRODUCTION PROCESS**

**![][image1]**

## **Sulfuric Acid Plant (Process Flow Components)**

The image is a technical schematic of a Contact Process plant. Below are the key components identified for inventory or process mapping.

| Component Category | Equipment / Stage Name |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Reactants** | $SO\_2$, Steam, Air |
| **Heat Management** | Waste Heat Boiler, Cold IP Exchanger, Hot IP Exchange, Secondary Economizer, Economizer Superheat |
| **Conversion** | 4 Pass Converter |
| **Absorption** | Absorbing Tower, Final Absorbing Tower, Interpass/Final Absorber Circulating Tanks |
| **Output** | 98-99% Acid Storage, Exit Gas Stock |
| **Cooling** | Acid Coolers |

**My analysis:**  
The digitization made the process understandable. 

# Mpesa statement

**SAMPLE OF A MPESA STATEMENT**

**![][image2]**

## **2\. M-PESA Statement: Nancy Wangui Taiti**

**Period:** 09 Mar 2024 \- 09 Apr 2024

| Transaction Type | Paid In | Paid Out |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Send Money | 0.00 | 271,330.00 |
| Received Money | 306,300.00 | 0.00 |
| Agent Deposit | 128,000.00 | 0.00 |
| Agent Withdrawal | 0.00 | 37,698.00 |
| Lipa Na M-Pesa (Paybill) | 0.00 | 40,129.00 |
| Lipa Na M-Pesa (Buy Goods) | 0.00 | 57,155.67 |
| Others | 59,767.25 | 70,454.00 |
| **Total** | **494,067.25** | **476,766.67** |

| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |

My analysis:

# Handwritten invoice

**HANDWRITTEN INVOICE**  
**![][image3]**

## **1\. Invoice: Samsuddin Siddiqui**

**Bill No:** 287 | **Date:** 28/10/2024

**Customer:** BVC Logistics Pvt. Ltd.

| Sr. No | Particulars | Qty Pcs. | Rate | Amount (Rs.) |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Falash Tank Push Button | 1 set | 240 | 240 |
| 2 | Zed Exp. Brash | 1 | 550 | 550 |
| 3 | Bathroom Comot English New Fitting | 2 | 230 | 460 |
| 4 | Preshar Nut \- Unirar Brass | 2 | 450 | 900 |
| 5 | Pipe Zed Exp and Preshar Pipe | 2 | 195 | 390 |
| 6 | Plumber Charge | \- | 2300 | 2300 |
| 7 | Pata Bolt \- New | 1 | 836 | 836 |
| 8 | Hadrotics Gas | 1 | 750 | 750 |
| 9 | Libur Charge | \- | 800 | 800 |
|  | **TOTAL** |  |  |  |

The AI did well though it did include the total in the table as seen above
